blockers.message: Missing config/live_mandate.json: User-written live trading mandate with broker, account scope, instrument scope, max order size, max exposure, and expiration.
Missing config/broker_connection.json: Non-secret broker connection profile or paper/live capability manifest. Secrets must not be committed.

data_boundary: Local live-account preflight only; no broker connection, no secrets, no account access, no live orders.
warnings: Git user.email is a local placeholder, not a verified GitHub email.
